hero.badge: Open to Fresher / Intern · Ho Chi Minh City
hero.bio: A hardworking developer who believes in learning by doing. Currently studying Web Development at Cao Thang Technical College, specializing in the Next.js ecosystem — React, TypeScript, Node.js.

about.title: About Me
about.subtitle: Developer, endless learner
about.bio1: Hello! I'm Nguyen Quoc Duong, a Frontend Developer specializing in the Next.js ecosystem — React, Node.js, TypeScript.
about.bio2: Passionate about building high-performance web applications and solving complex system problems.
about.bio3: Outside of coding, I spend time researching new skills to continuously grow and develop myself.
about.education: Cao Thang Technical College · Web Dev · HCMC
